findings.issue: AC-18 is untestable: 'UI масштабируемый, удобный, современный и быстрый' — this is a subjective quality assessment, not a verifiable criterion. It cannot be verified by automated test or manual check with a concrete expected result.
findings.fix: Either remove AC-18 as a criterion (the intent is already captured in the 'Зачем' section) or reformulate as a concrete binary gate: e.g., 'Пользователь на Honor 200 подтверждает: каждый из AC-1..17 пройден и субъективно приложение пригодно для ежедневного использования'. The phrase 'масштабируемый, удобный, современный и быстрый' without concrete anchors cannot be verified.

findings.issue: Contradiction between 'Ограничения' and the user flows / interview. The spec states ':core-runtime в Phase 2 можно расширять, но только портированием компонентов из gallery-source/' (Ограничения), yet the interview phase1_feature_overview summary (line 255) contains ':core-runtime в Phase 2 НЕ ТРОГАЕМ — Phase 2 это "обёртка" над готовым ядром'. The 'Как должно работать' user stories and Ограничения section of user-spec correctly resolve this (extension = porting only), but AC-17 lists new unit tests for ':core-runtime — AllowlistLoaderTest расширяется кейсами для новых полей llmSupportImage/Audio/Thinking; EffectiveConfigTest проверяет слияние defaults и overrides' which implies active changes to :core-runtime. The spec text is internally consistent, but the framing creates ambiguity that could confuse implementers.
findings.location: Ограничения ('core-runtime можно расширять') vs interview constraint summary ('не трогаем')
findings.fix: Add a clarifying sentence in Ограничения: 'Расширение :core-runtime означает исключительно портирование существующих компонентов из gallery-source/ (image helpers, audio helpers). AC-1 (парсинг allowlist) и AC-17 (новые unit-тесты) — входят в разрешённое расширение.'

findings.issue: Interview topic 'unit tests for multimodal preparation layer' (bitmap compressor, Contents builder, audio recorder wrapper) discussed explicitly in Q4 answer and testing_strategy is partially missing from the spec. The spec AC-17 lists AppSettingsRepositoryTest, AllowlistLoaderTest, EffectiveConfigTest — but does not mention bitmap compressor / Contents builder / audio recorder wrapper unit tests that were explicitly agreed in the interview (question_num: 4, testing_strategy phase1 entry).
findings.fix: Add to AC-17 and Тестирование section: unit tests for (a) decodeSampledBitmapFromUri / Bitmap compressor, (b) multimodal Contents builder (text + Bitmap + ByteArray → litertlm Content), (c) audio recording wrapper (PCM format validation). These were agreed in Q4.

findings.issue: Interview edge case 'Запись прервана звонком / уходом в фон → AudioRecord release, запись отбрасывается' appears in interview edge_cases (line 378) but has no corresponding acceptance criterion or mention in user-spec 'Как проверить' section. This is a device-specific scenario requiring explicit handling.
findings.location: Критерии приёмки — no AC for audio interruption by phone call
findings.fix: Add to AC-15 (permissions/audio) or as a separate AC: 'При входящем звонке или уходе приложения в фон во время аудио-записи — AudioRecord освобождается, незавершённая запись отбрасывается, bottom sheet закрывается.'

findings.issue: Interview edge case 'Модель llmSupportImage=false → иконки camera/gallery скрыты в input bar' (interview line 383) has no acceptance criterion in the spec. This is a direct behavioral requirement, not a risk.
findings.location: Критерии приёмки — no AC for llmSupportImage=false hiding camera/gallery icons
findings.fix: Add AC for input bar adaptive behavior: 'Если для загруженной модели llmSupportImage=false — иконки камеры и галереи скрыты в input bar. Если llmSupportThinking=false — toggle enableThinking скрыт в настройках bottom sheet.'

findings.issue: Interview success_criteria (line 233) explicitly lists 'Переключение темы dark/light через SettingsScreen работает без рестарта приложения' as a functional success criterion. But the user-spec correctly states SettingsScreen does not exist in Phase 2 and theme is system-only. This interview entry was superseded by the architectural pivot in Q6 (SettingsScreen removed) but the interview.yml success_criteria was never updated, creating a discrepancy. The spec is correct per the pivot, but the contradiction with earlier interview data could mislead reviewers.
findings.location: Зачем / Ограничения (theme is system-only, SettingsScreen absent) vs interview success_criteria lines 233-234
findings.fix: The spec is correct — no action needed on the spec itself. However, note that this is a known stale interview entry and the spec supersedes it.

findings.issue: AC-16 contains two partially untestable components: 'AC-14 Phase 1 (паритет скорости с Gallery) продолжает соблюдаться' — the 'Как проверить → Пользователь проверяет' section says 'субъективно + TTFT из футера Phase 1 не регрессировал относительно Phase 1 AC-14' which is adequate, but AC-16 in the criterion itself says 'переключение между моделями работает' without specifying what 'works' means (no crash? successful init? both models respond?).
findings.fix: Clarify AC-16: 'переключение между моделями работает' → 'после тапа «Загрузить» на второй модели: предыдущий engine выгружается без краша, новый инициализируется, чат открывается пустым и отвечает на текстовый запрос.'

findings.issue: Size is declared as L, which is correct. However, 18 acceptance criteria (AC-1..18, excluding AC-19..21 as optional) and 7 user stories exceed the informal warning thresholds for a size=L spec. This is expected for L, but worth noting that the spec is at the upper boundary of L scope and could risk creep.
findings.fix: No change needed — L is appropriate. Consider noting in AC-18 that it serves as the explicit phase-completion gate to prevent scope drift.

findings.issue: Frontmatter 'created: 2026-04-16' — the interview started on 2026-04-15 and was completed 2026-04-16. This is correct per convention (date of spec writing), no issue.

covered: scope_framing: Phase 2 = L, one ChatScreen, no HF OAuth, entry = ModelManagerScreen
storage_format: Proto DataStore for per-model overrides
core_boundary: :core-runtime extension by porting from gallery-source only
attachment_lifecycle: ephemeral in-memory, freed on ChatScreen exit
renaming: app_name = 'Sanctum Machina'
AudioRecord vs MediaRecorder: AudioRecord chosen (raw PCM)
PNG vs JPEG: PNG kept (ядро не трогаем)
per-model key: modelId (not modelName)
core-settings module: separate gradle module for DataStore
compose-richtext + autoscroll in Phase 2
attachments in-memory vs tmp: in-memory chosen
theme: system-only via isSystemInDarkTheme(), no override
US-1..US-7 user stories
AC-1..AC-17 acceptance criteria
AC-18..AC-20 optional criteria (mapped to AC-19..AC-21 in spec)
R1..R8 risks with mitigations
D1..D12 technical decisions
edge cases: permissions, photo limit, audio autostop, OOM, double-tap, back during stream
error scenarios: init failure, inference error, DataStore corruption, audio error, URI read error, permission permanently denied
inference settings as bottom sheet inside ChatScreen (pivot from dedicated screen)
SettingsScreen removed entirely
AboutScreen as independent NavHost destination
heavy settings warning dialog before reinit
icon stays placeholder until Phase 5
testing strategy: no Compose UI tests, unit tests for core-settings + allowlist + effective config
missing: Unit tests for multimodal preparation layer (bitmap compressor, Contents builder, audio recorder wrapper) — discussed in Q4 and testing_strategy but absent from AC-17 and Тестирование section
AC for llmSupportImage=false hiding camera/gallery icons — in interview edge_cases but no AC in spec
AC for audio interrupted by phone call / app backgrounded — in interview edge_cases but no AC in spec

summary: Спек качественный и детальный — покрывает все ключевые решения, риски и сценарии из интервью; два критических дефекта требуют исправления: AC-18 нетестируем в текущей формулировке, и противоречие между «:core-runtime не трогаем» и «расширяем портированием» требует явного уточнения; три major-находки связаны с отсутствием AC для договорённостей из интервью (unit-тесты multimodal layer, скрытие иконок при llmSupportImage=false, поведение при прерывании аудиозаписи звонком).
